title: P1-R2-01 Add ESLint strict-TypeScript configuration and npm lint script
description: Install ESLint with typescript-eslint strict type-checked preset. Create config, add npm run lint script, fix lint errors in R2-touched code so the script exits cleanly.

title: P1-R2-02 Add Prettier configuration and npm format script
description: Install Prettier, create config, add npm run format and format:check scripts. Integrate with ESLint via eslint-config-prettier to prevent rule conflicts.

title: P1-R2-03 Add Husky + lint-staged pre-commit hooks
description: Install Husky and lint-staged. Configure pre-commit hook to run ESLint --fix and Prettier --write on staged TS/JS files. Wire via prepare script.

title: P1-R2-04 Configure Vitest reporting and npm test script
description: Install Vitest, create config with TypeScript path resolution, add npm run test script, configure CI-suitable reporter, add a minimal smoke test to verify the harness.

title: P2-R2-05 Audit and remove 'any' from shared/core code paths
description: Audit all shared/core TypeScript files for 'any' usage. Replace with explicit types, generics, or 'unknown' with narrowing. Preserve runtime behaviour.

title: P2-R2-06 Type component props with explicit interfaces for refactored hotspots
description: Define and export explicit TypeScript prop interfaces for Admin, Dashboard, KanbanBoard, and EditTaskDialog components and their future child components.

title: P2-R2-07 Type server route handlers and storage layer contracts
description: Define IStorage interface, domain entity types (Stage, SubStage, Task, InsertTask), API response shapes, and typed Express route handler signatures. Verify strict TS settings.

title: P3-R2-08 Extract useStages and useSubStages shared hooks
description: Create useStages and useSubStages hooks encapsulating data fetching, caching, loading, and error state. Replace all inline stage/sub-stage fetching across components.

title: P3-R2-09 Unify API fetch layer into typed apiRequest<T> wrapper
description: Create a typed apiRequest<T> wrapper handling URL construction, headers, JSON parsing, and error handling. Refactor all client-side API fetch calls to use it.

title: P3-R2-10 Extract shared constants module for app-level constants in current use
description: Identify scattered hardcoded values (status strings, route paths, config defaults, magic numbers). Create a shared constants module and replace inline values in refactored paths.

title: P3-R2-11 Create parseIdParam helper and refactor repeated route parsing
description: Create a parseIdParam helper to extract and validate numeric IDs from Express request params. Replace all repeated parseInt/isNaN patterns in server routes.

title: P4-R2-12 Extract seed/bootstrap logic out of server/routes.ts
description: Move seed data and bootstrap/initialisation logic from server/routes.ts into a dedicated seed/bootstrap module. Update server startup to invoke it. Preserve exact seeding behaviour.

title: P5-R2-13 Decompose Admin.tsx into focused modules
description: Split Admin.tsx into focused child components with single responsibilities. Target ~200 LOC per module. Apply typed prop interfaces. Preserve identical behaviour.

title: P5-R2-14 Decompose Dashboard.tsx into focused modules
description: Split Dashboard.tsx into focused child components with single responsibilities. Target ~200 LOC per module. Apply typed prop interfaces. Preserve identical behaviour.

title: P5-R2-15 Decompose KanbanBoard.tsx into focused modules
description: Split KanbanBoard.tsx into focused child components (columns, cards, drag-drop handlers). Target ~200 LOC per module. Apply typed prop interfaces. Preserve identical behaviour including drag-and-drop.

title: P5-R2-16 Decompose EditTaskDialog.tsx into focused modules
description: Split EditTaskDialog.tsx into focused child components (form sections, field groups, submission handler). Target ~200 LOC per module. Apply typed prop interfaces. Preserve identical behaviour.

title: P6-R2-17 Implement Express error-handling middleware and consistent error responses
description: Create Express error-handling middleware (err, req, res, next), define consistent JSON error response shape, create custom AppError class with status codes. Wire as final middleware.

title: P6-R2-18 Add React ErrorBoundary at app root
description: Create a React ErrorBoundary class component with fallback UI and recovery action. Wrap the app root to catch unhandled component errors. Log caught errors.

title: P6-R2-19 Replace console logging with environment-gated logger
description: Create a lightweight logger module with log levels (debug, info, warn, error) gated by NODE_ENV. Replace raw console.log/error in production code paths. Works on both server and client.

title: P6-R2-20 Fix rethrow-after-response bug in server error handler
description: Fix the known bug in server/index.ts where an error is rethrown after a response has been sent, causing 'Cannot set headers after they are sent' crash. Check res.headersSent before acting.

title: P6-R2-21 Stop request logging from leaking full response bodies
description: Modify request logging to capture metadata (method, URL, status, duration) without including response body content. Gate verbose logging behind debug level for development only.

title: P7-R2-22 Write tests for shared hooks and extracted utilities
description: Write Vitest unit tests for useStages, useSubStages, apiRequest, parseIdParam, logger, and shared constants. Cover primary success and error paths. Mock external dependencies.

title: P7-R2-23 Write integration tests against the IStorage contract
description: Write Vitest integration tests exercising each IStorage method. Test CRUD for tasks, stages, sub-stages. Cover edge cases (not-found, invalid input). Use test database or in-memory adapter.

title: P7-R2-24 Write API route tests for critical paths touched by the refactor
description: Write Vitest route tests for critical CRUD endpoints using supertest. Test success paths (status codes, response shapes) and error paths (invalid IDs, missing fields, not-found).

title: P7-R2-25 Add focused component tests for refactored hotspots where logic was extracted
description: Write Vitest + React Testing Library component tests for decomposed Admin, Dashboard, KanbanBoard, and EditTaskDialog modules. Test rendering, key interactions, and prop-driven behaviour.

title: P8-R2-26 Remove confirmed-unused dependencies
description: Audit package.json against actual imports. Remove dependencies confirmed to have zero references. Verify build, start, and all quality checks pass after removal.

title: P8-R2-27 Gate or remove Replit-specific plugins for non-Replit environments
description: Identify Replit-specific plugins and config. Gate behind environment detection (process.env.REPL_ID) or remove if Replit is no longer used. Eliminate non-Replit warnings/errors.

title: P8-R2-28 Update ARCHITECTURE.md and COMPONENT_INDEX.md to reflect the R2 structure
description: Update ARCHITECTURE.md and COMPONENT_INDEX.md to reflect post-R2 module structure: decomposed components, shared hooks/utilities, error handling architecture. Remove stale references.
